flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Berkeley City College fell 57% between 2009 and 2010 (18.2% → 7.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Berkeley City College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($564 → $766).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Berkeley City College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $9.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Berkeley City College fell 13% between 2007 and 2010 (59.2% → 51.6%).
